claims.summary: The optional 12D glimpse can thin distinctions present in the richer context.
claims.disposition: Verified the additive 12D contract explicitly records anchors and does not claim lossless equivalence to the richer source.

claims.summary: Tail vibrancy should not conceal compression and resonance loss.
claims.disposition: Verified fidelity, resonance-loss, tail-bridge, and distinguishability fields remain separate in current evidence.

claims.summary: A 32D-versus-12D comparison should test whether distinct states collapse under pressure.
claims.disposition: Routed to a shadow-only comparison keyed to exact inputs and the existing pressure preflight; it changes no payload.

claims.summary: A vibrancy-preservation flag or weighted tail could improve the glimpse.
claims.disposition: Preserved as Tier 5 because weighting or transporting new flags changes the live codec and protocol semantics.
